uncertainties:

- No parent issue number, repository, parent issue body text, or existing comment text were provided in the benchmark prompt, so placeholders were used.
- The assigned `SKILL.md` conflicts with the eval prompt on parent-body updates; I followed the skill and therefore drafted no body-update command.
